Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, NA'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/DEW) Judge Diane E. Wick, Reporter Maria Torreano, CSR #8600
